summary: Successfully updated `plan.md` to address all reviewer findings. The goal statement was narrowed to clarify that swept runs are resumable but retry is disallowed (with 409) due to the lack of an active phase or history. A new unit test was detailed in Step 3 that types the test fixture properly and exercises both `resume` (allowed) and `retry` (denied) through `planRunRecoveryAction`, verifying the recovery rules end-to-end. We also added verification of the SQLite-level persistence of `currentPhase: null` by detailing a unit test in the infrastructure layer. Finally, workspace-wide validation checks (`pnpm depcruise` and `pnpm lint`) were incorporated into the verification steps.
